falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the pattern's implied bearish bias, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average volume on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would suggest a major market shift or blowoff top, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal's expectation of consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) crosses above 70 and stays above for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This overbought condition would signal a potential reversal against the pattern's expected trajectory, falsifying the 'UNKNOWN' verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
